promptTemplate: A photorealistic fashion portrait of a {{nationality}} subject — wonky, silly, outlandish, creative, unapologetic, naive, extravagant, otherworldly, and carefree — a perfect masterpiece {{influence}} on canvas. Balenciaga-adjacent outsider art streetwear fashion photography. A wonderfully strange, unforgettable neo-expressionism portrait. Candid photography of a {{year}} art party, {{director_influence}}, evoking {{fashion_chaos}}. Kodak 400 film, DIC color guide, pantone pastel. A technicolor film-photograph of {{film_chaos}}, an unforgettably awkward, self-deprecating, and cringe performance on the {{year}} {{nationality}} fashion-week runway, recorded with a D-Theater HD DVHS on Fujifilm 400 35mm film.

tags.label: Blurred Autonomy / Synthetic Existence — Eden txt2img Pipeline
tags.description: Converted from Eden txt2img-comfy pipeline (juggernautXL v8, cfg 6, 40 steps). Original had 5 variables: influence (5 large artist-list blocks), directorinfluence (21 vals), nationality (225 vals), year (11 vals), negprompt (4 vals). Nationality curated to 12 values; year curated to 8 canonical years. negprompt dropped. Two new variables synthesized from the rich prompt body: fashion_chaos and film_chaos, capturing the dual identity of the prompt (fashion portrait + found-footage chaos). Artist lists condensed to readable form, preserving the curatorial groupings.
